case_title: PETER MILLER VS. ADULT DIGITAL MEDIA (ADM), INC., A NEVADA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT ADULT DIGITAL MEDIA (ADM), INC., A NEVADA CORPORATION DBA SIN CITY DIGITAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADULT DIGITAL MEDIA (ADM), INC., A NEVADA CORPORATION DBA SIN CITY DIGITAL $27,194.17 PRINCIPAL, $224.87 INTEREST, $325.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $27,744.04, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
